label: sandbox • writable combined mode: one write tool, two filesystems, path decides
query: Create two files with file_write: first, host-note.txt containing exactly 'HOST-SIDE-4471' in the workspace (relative path host-note.txt); second, vm-note.txt containing exactly 'VM-SIDE-8825' in your sandbox home (use the absolute path under your sandbox home — your system prompt states it; relative paths go to the workspace).
notes: Path-routing discipline for the unified WRITERS in writable combined mode: the same file_write must land one file on the host (relative path, tracked change) and one in the VM (absolute /workspace/... path via the sandbox write bridge) with zero errors. The dual assertion (files + sandboxFiles) can only pass if both routes actually worked; a model that writes both to one side fails the other side's assertion.
